title: Functions of the Sulfatase-Modifying Factor 1 in Helicoverpa armigera Development and Glucosinolates Adaptation
author: Long, Zhang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero

steps.instruction: In this study, we detailed the indicators of development of H. armigera , such as growth and development period, number of surviving larvae, body weight, pupa weight, and number, as well as the relative expression levels of HaSumf1 gene at different instars, and the third- and fifth-instars after feeding with glucosinolates and /or ds Sumf1 .
